summary: M302 — Gameplay batch 1: companion level-sync setting + party avg on save slots, flee-from-combat with DEX check (boss-immune), Rogue skills Pilfer Magic + Hemorrhage, Warlock Soul Curse with on-death spread, skill-check map node type with 4 examples, node-overlay system (traveling merchant/memory minigame/bandit patrol — overlays must resolve before underlying node, no skip), per-spell DoT stacking modes (per_source/per_character/global) with tooltip stack counts.
